name: Azure RBAC (ARM role assignments at a scope)
status: structure built v2.4.183 -- ARM roleAssignments PUT-with-client-GUID. Live-validation pending an ARM token + a scope the SPN can read/write role assignments on.
permissionsNeeded: Microsoft.Authorization/roleAssignments/write + /read at the target scope (e.g. the 'User Access Administrator' or 'Owner' role for the SPN), Microsoft.Authorization/roleDefinitions/read

prerequisites.scopeIsArmPath: Each row's Scope column = the ARM scope path the role applies at, e.g. /subscriptions/<sub> or /subscriptions/<sub>/resourceGroups/<rg> or a resource id. Role definitions + assignments are listed/created at that scope.
prerequisites.roleIdIsFullPath: listRoles returns each role's full resource id (/subscriptions/.../roleDefinitions/<guid>); the assign body uses it verbatim as roleDefinitionId.
prerequisites.clientGuidPut: ARM creates a role assignment with PUT to roleAssignments/<new-guid> -- the engine supplies a fresh {newId} per row.
prerequisites.tokenAdapter: auth=arm -> token for https://management.azure.com/ via $global:PIM_WorkloadTokens['arm'] (launcher-minted) or Get-AzAccessToken.
